user.title: Cloudflare DDNS
user.description: Enter your Cloudflare API Token and the DNS record to update.

data_description.target_ipv6: Leave both target fields blank to track this machine (the Home Assistant host). To track ANOTHER device, the most reliable option is to enter that device's fixed global IPv6 here — run 'ip -6 addr' (or 'ipconfig') on it and copy the stable 'scope global' address. Works for any device and OS.
data_description.target_mac: Alternative to the fixed IPv6 above: resolve another device's IPv6 from its MAC (e.g. aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:ff), via the NDP neighbour cache then EUI-64. ⚠️ This only works reliably for devices that use EUI-64 addresses (some Linux/IoT/routers). Modern phones, Macs and Windows use RFC 7217 / privacy addresses that CANNOT be derived from a MAC — use the fixed IPv6 field for those. If both fields are filled, the fixed IPv6 wins.

record_type.title: Record Types
record_type.description: Select which record types to update. At least one must be selected.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Cloudflare. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_token: Invalid API Token or insufficient permissions. The token needs Zone:DNS:Edit.
error.zone_not_found: Zone not found. Make sure the zone name matches exactly what is in Cloudflare.
error.select_at_least_one: Select at least one record type (IPv4 or IPv6).
error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address format. Use aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:ff or aa-bb-cc-dd-ee-ff.
error.invalid_ipv6: Invalid IPv6 address. Enter a global (public) IPv6 address, not a link-local (fe80::) or private one.

abort.already_configured: A DDNS entry for this record name already exists.

init.title: IP Detection Sources
init.description:
Override the default IP detection URLs. Enter comma-separated URLs, or leave blank to use the built-in defaults.

**Note:** IPv6 always reads the stable address directly from the local network interface first (`/proc/net/if_inet6`). The IPv6 URLs below are only used as a fallback when the local interface cannot be read (e.g. isolated container).
